overview: MyScaledWorld Diorama Builder is an e-commerce platform where scale model collectors configure modular diorama kits with a real-time 3D preview, bill of materials, and checkout flow.
features: Interactive 3D configurator with Three.js STL rendering and placeholder geometries
Left-panel parts list with per-item quantity selectors
Right-panel live 3D preview with orbit controls and basic item transforms
Object-storage integration for admin STL file uploads
Auto-generated bill of materials with quantity aggregation
Add complete configured kit to cart with BOM breakdown
Shop catalog, checkout flow, and order confirmation
